## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested this. -->
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] Ran `ruff check src/ tests/` with no errors
- [ ] Ran `ruff format --check src/ tests/` with no errors
- [ ] Tested in demo / batch mode (`python main_pipeline.py --mode demo`)
- [ ] Dashboard builds cleanly (`cd dashboard && npm run build`)

## Checklist
- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style
- [ ] I have added / updated tests for new behaviour
- [ ] I have updated `docs/` or `README.md` if the public interface changed
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or credentials are committed
